Bug Details

Custom Command issue: Execute command 5: Wait for Login and then click Search bar (High / P1)

During automated validation of "Custom Command - Execute command 5: Wait for Login and then click Search bar", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.

Expected: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.

Actual: Step failed after 3 attempts: No executable UI action matched intent: "click Search bar".

Suggested fix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.

Custom Command issue: Execute command 12: Move to cart and click "proceed to checkout" to reach shipping address screen (Critical / P0)

During automated validation of "Custom Command - Execute command 12: Move to cart and click "proceed to checkout" to reach shipping address screen", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.

Expected: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.

Actual: Step failed after 3 attempts: No executable UI action matched intent: ""proceed to checkout" to reach shipping address screen".

Suggested fix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.
